title: origins:unknown
description: it adds powerful origins to minecraft origins mod.it will have fabric support later
body:
currently adds origin - something
DO NOT USE THIS FOR SERVER
powers,
- hardended - you can only eat cooked foods and meats
- superthorn hands - you deal 500 damage
- wings - u can fly
- idc about lava - u can walk on lava
- scavenger - start with elytra,golden apples and iron ingots
